name: Warforged
summary: The warforged were built to fight in the Last War. The first warforged were mindless automatons, but House Cannith devoted vast resources to improving these steel soldiers. An unexpected breakthrough produced fully sentient soldiers, blending organic and inorganic materials. Warforged are made from wood and metal, but they can feel pain and emotion. Built as weapons, they must now find a purpose beyond the war. A warforged can be a steadfast ally, a cold-hearted killing machine, or a visionary in search of purpose and meaning.

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: Your Constitution score increases by 2, and one other ability score of your choice increases by 1.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Your size is Medium. To set your height and weight randomly, start with rolling a size modifier. Size modifier = 2d6

stats.label: Speed
stats.value: Your base walking speed is 30 feet.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: You can speak, read, and write Common and one other language of your choice.

stats.label: Size
stats.value: Your size is Medium. Most warforged stand between 5 and 6 1/2 feet tall. Weight and build are affected by subrace.

coreTraits.name: Age
coreTraits.summary: A typical warforged is between two and thirty years old. The maximum lifespan of the warforged remains a mystery; so far, warforged have shown no signs of deterioration due to age. You are immune to magical aging effects.

coreTraits.name: Alignment
coreTraits.summary: Most warforged take comfort in order and discipline, tending toward law and neutrality. But some have absorbed the morality – or lack thereof – of the beings with which they served.

coreTraits.name: Constructed Resilience
coreTraits.summary: You were created to have remarkable fortitude, represented by the following benefits: You have advantage on saving throws against being poisoned, and you have resistance to poison damage.

coreTraits.name: Sentry's Rest
coreTraits.summary: When you take a long rest, you must spend at least six hours in an inactive, motionless state, rather than sleeping. In this state, you appear inert, but it doesn’t render you unconscious, and you can see and hear as normal.

coreTraits.name: Integrated Protection
coreTraits.summary: Your body has built-in defensive layers, which can be enhanced with armor. You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class.

coreTraits.name: Specialized Design
coreTraits.summary: You gain one skill proficiency and one tool proficiency of your choice.
